theme.name: Cosmic Obsidian
guidelines: Use mix-blend-mode heavily for cinematic overlays.
Use physics-spring animations on buttons via Framer Motion.
Use dynamic liquid glass effects for AI elements.

architecture.state: Zustand (Global) + Local State for transient UI
architecture.backend: Express API with Server-Sent Events (SSE) for /api/chat streaming

doNotMutate: The streaming SSE architecture in ChatPanel and server.ts
The Cosmic Obsidian dark theme fundamentals
The IndexedDB schema without proper migration
